message:
fix(bench): correct theme_studio_bench compilation issues

- Remove unused BenchmarkId import
- Use preset_index instead of &demo in black_box (avoids closure escape)
- Change Vec<f64> to Vec<f32> to match contrast_ratio return type
- Rename build_token_list to new_with_tokens (accesses public field)
- Make Focus enum and helper methods pub for benchmarking
- Keep tokens field private as implementation detail

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
